lists.2: internal failure confirmed or protection function occured (Assistance_enable_level < safe_ssiste_level)

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

lists.49270: (U0076) CAN BUSS OFF Fault on 1ch(For DiagMux DTC)
lists.22108: (C165C) EPS is in very soft ramp down mode(sub)
lists.22077: (C163D) Missing or unreliable control requests for APA (AVM Failure)

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

CAN Ignition status for state machine (m.comment: The Ignition / AutoACC logical value, as received through CAN network.

Mileage at first occurrence.comment: the mileage of the first occurence given by the steering wheel

CAN_DTC_filter1 (main).comment: the value of the internal corresponding parameter.

CAN_DTC_filter2 (main).comment: the value of the internal corresponding parameter.

Resume flag, address, size.comment: Used for resume function of OTA

Configuration Signature.comment: Used for signature verification of $F0B0 "Configuration FOTA MegaFrame" of OTA

Configuration FOTA MegaFrame.comment: Contains all parameters to be configured in OTA

JTEKT_VirginFlag.comment: DID only for JTEKT internal use

R Counter Reset.comment: Reset flash counter and DTC status

Internal Fault_F tables main1.comment: Confirm internal fault code F table(fault related to application)

Internal Fault_E tables main1.comment: Confirm internal fault code E table

Digest1.comment: [DRC14] (to determine which logical block shall be downloaded)
